# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    name: vnet
    location: West US
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - 10.0.0.0/16
      subnets:
        - name: webSubnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
        - name: appSubnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: 10.0.2.0/24
        - name: databaseSubnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: 10.0.3.0/24

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    name: nsg
    location: West US
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: allowWebInbound
          protocol: Tcp
          sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
          destinationAddressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
          destinationPortRange: 80-80
          access: Allow

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    name: nic
    location: West US
    properties:
      networkSecurityGroup:
        id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/nsg

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    name: vm
    location: West US
    properties:
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/nic
